description: You are a logistics operations manager. Using the sales data file at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, build a cumulative revenue tracking report in Power BI Desktop. The report must include a calculated table named 'DateTable' with 'Year' and 'MonthNum' columns, related to the sales data. Create a DAX measure named 'Cumulative_Revenue' that calculates the running total of 'Sales_Amount'. The report should contain an Area Chart visual of 'Cumulative_Revenue' over time and a Card visual for the total 'Sales_Amount'. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Cumulative_Revenue_Report.pbix.
